title: Vicloon Retractable Badge Reels, 2pcs Heavy Duty Keychain, 2 in 1 Clips Badge Holder With Key Belt Reel for Key Ring ID Card
features: 【Extendable Nylon Cord】2pcs retractable badge holder, The easy-pull buckle is strong enough to put the key ring on the belt, retractable cord up to 65cm, and it can be stretched out to open the door when in use. Let it go when not in use, it will automatically spring back to the waist, avoiding the frequent loss of keys caused by random throwing.

【Unique Design】Elastic string of reasonable length and easy to use.each badge reel has keychain and plastic buckle， Suitable for Multiple securing points for keys/ID badges a must for staff, easy to clip your badge and ID card set.

【Snap Separation Design】You can easily remove the snap from the key ring as you want. It is a useful tool for adults and children, suitable for family camping, hiking, and other outdoor activities, preventing loss and keeping it neat and tidy.
【Wide Application】Retractable key ring can be widely used in office, home and outdoor activities, such as fishing and hiking, and can be used with ID cards, access cards, keys, etc.

【Note】The Retractable Keyring is designed to be light and easy to stretch. It is very durable and firm for light items, the function of the design is only applicable to light items, such as Id Card Badge entrance guard card and key other, please do not use heavy objects or pull them to the bottom by gravity, which can easily cause damage to the telescopic spring.
description: Product Description Robust material The retractable keyring is made of durable hard plastic, zinc alloy and elastic nylon strap. With the retractable key reel you can pull your card through without removing your ID. You can also open the door without taking the key out of the belt. Multi-purpose Each retractable key reel has a key ring and a plastic buckle, the cord can be up to 65 cm long, the D-shaped climbing hook and the clip on the back can be easily attached, it is a good helper for daily use. Ease of use You only need to attach the ID card yo-yo to clothes, belts or bags, it must be stretched and is recycled after use with its own powerful turbo spring, which is very convenient to use. Good accessory Retractable badge reels are widely used in various occasions and industries and are suitable for school employees, nurses, office workers, students, golf trips, fishing trips, skiing, etc. Special feature: 1. Scalable 2. Easy to use 3. Small size, easy to carry
